accounts.name: round
docs: re-serializing after ownership transfers to the delegation program.

accounts.name: oracle_queue
docs: local test queue (Sc9MJU…) differs from the SDK default (5hBR571…).
Integrity is enforced by the callback's VRF_PROGRAM_IDENTITY signer, never
by which queue the request is posted to: a wrong queue yields no callback
(round recoverable via cancel_round), it cannot forge randomness.

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Numeric overflow

errors.name: BadBlock
errors.msg: Block index out of range (0..25)

errors.name: RoundNotOpen
errors.msg: Round is not open

errors.name: RoundNotEnded
errors.msg: Round deadline has not passed

errors.name: RoundEnded
errors.msg: Round deadline has passed

errors.name: BadRoundState
errors.msg: Round is not in the required state

errors.name: StakeTooSmall
errors.msg: Stake below minimum

errors.name: StakeTooLarge
errors.msg: Stake exceeds per-round maximum

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient escrow balance

errors.name: UnclaimedRound
errors.msg: Must claim previous round before staking a new one

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Round already claimed by this player

errors.name: WithdrawLocked
errors.msg: Cannot withdraw with an active unclaimed round

errors.name: WrongSwapMode
errors.msg: Swap mode mismatch

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized

errors.name: MinerRoundMismatch
errors.msg: MinerPosition round mismatch

errors.name: Insolvent
errors.msg: Pot vault lamports insufficient to cover escrow liabilities plus this round's pot

errors.name: PriorRoundNotSettled
errors.msg: Previous round must be finalized (claimable or closed) before opening a new one

errors.name: RoundNotCancelable
errors.msg: Round cannot be canceled (must be past deadline and in Open/Settled state)

errors.name: RoundNotClosed
errors.msg: Round is not closed

errors.name: NothingToRefund
errors.msg: No refundable stake for this player in this round

errors.name: NotCurrentRound
errors.msg: Round id is not the current round

errors.name: RoundAlreadyJoined
errors.msg: Escrow already joined to a round

errors.name: AlreadyReconciled
errors.msg: Miner already reconciled for this round

errors.name: CommitTooEarly
errors.msg: Cannot commit a miner while its round is still open (staking not closed)

errors.name: BadReturnBand
errors.msg: Invalid return band (require min <= max <= RETURN_MAX_BPS)

errors.name: BadBeefVault
errors.msg: Beef vault token account has wrong owner or mint

errors.name: BadBeefParams
errors.msg: Invalid beef params (divisor and secs_per_tick must be > 0)

fields.name: beef_vault
docs: SPL token account holding the emission supply. Owner = the existing
vault_authority PDA. Ops-side this sits at a vanity BEEF... address;
the program only cares that this pubkey matches.

fields.name: divisor
docs: emission_per_round = free_vault / divisor (free = vault - total_owed).

fields.name: total_owed
docs: Solvency ledger: every stamped emission and accrued bonus is recognized
here the moment it becomes claimable; claims subtract their payout.
free_vault = vault.amount - total_owed can never go negative-spendable.

fields.name: unclaimed
docs: Rolled-in, not-yet-claimed BEEF (base units).

fields.name: bonus_bps
docs: Hold-to-grow bonus in bps (0..=cap). Payout = unclaimed*(10000+bonus)/10000.

fields.name: last_tick_ts
docs: Accrual cursor: ticks are counted from here; every touch sets it to now
(dead gate-closed gaps are skipped, never re-scanned).

fields.name: last_active_ts
docs: Last stake-accompanied touch (roll_beef). The activity gate: ticks stop
accruing past last_active_ts + activity_window_secs.

fields.name: last_rolled_round_id
docs: Monotonic double-roll guard (rounds are strictly increasing and a
MinerPosition only ever holds one round at a time).

fields.name: emission
docs: Frozen at stamp time (order-independent claims, same pattern as
Round.jackpot_pool). Shares divide this against Round.pot.
